description_long: This is a medium-sized deciduous tree with a straight, sturdy trunk and a moderately dense canopy of green, compound leaves. The trunk is brown and textured, tapering slightly as it rises and branching out into several main limbs. The branches are arranged in an alternate pattern, spreading outward and upward to form a rounded, somewhat asymmetrical crown. The foliage consists of numerous small leaflets, giving the canopy a light, airy appearance with visible gaps between clusters. No roots are visible above ground, and the tree's overall form suggests it is well-suited for urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or residential streets.
description: A medium-sized deciduous tree with a brown trunk and a moderately dense canopy of green, compound leaves. The branches spread outward in an alternate pattern, forming a rounded crown.
description_view_0: The tree is seen with its trunk centered and a full, rounded canopy of green leaves, showing a balanced spread of branches.
description_view_1: This view highlights the leftward spread of the branches, with the canopy appearing slightly more open and asymmetrical.
description_view_2: The tree's trunk is visible with a denser cluster of leaves on the right, and the canopy appears fuller on this side.
description_view_3: The right side of the canopy is more open, revealing more individual branches and a sparser leaf distribution.
